hero.title: Your AI-Powered Fitness Coach

appComparison.title: One Message vs. Six Taps
appComparison.subtitle: Other apps make you dig through menus to make a simple change. With Prime Coach, open your day's nutrition chat and just say it.

primeCoach.label: Prime Coach
primeCoach.userMessage: Swap my lunch chicken for fish
primeCoach.aiResponse: Done! Swapped to grilled salmon — same protein, +3g omega-3s. Your macros are updated.

whyPrimeCoach.title: Why Users Choose Prime Coach
whyPrimeCoach.description: Stop switching between five apps for workouts, meals, and random AI tips. Prime Coach connects training and nutrition so your week feels coherent — and your coach understands what you actually want to change.

items.title: Download the App
items.description: On Google Play — start your 7-day free trial. After that, premium unlocks the full AI coach and advanced features (details in the app).

items.title: Tell Us About You
items.description: Answer a few quick questions about your goals, fitness level, and food preferences.

items.title: Get Your Plan
items.description: Your personalized workout and meal plan is ready. Adjust anytime by chatting with your AI coach.

aiChatPreview.title: Talk to Your Coach
aiChatPreview.subtitle: Each day has its own chats — one for nutrition, one for lifting, one for cardio. Open the right chat and just say what you need.

conversation.text: I don't feel like chicken today, can we swap it?
Done! I swapped your lunch to grilled salmon — same protein, better omega-3s. Want me to adjust dinner too?
Yeah, make dinner lighter — something around 400 cal.
Updated! Dinner is now grilled chicken salad — 410 cal, 38g protein. Your daily macros still line up.

items.title: AI That Understands You
items.description: Most fitness apps give you a plan and leave you alone. Prime Coach lets you talk to your plan. Each day has dedicated chats for nutrition, lifting, and cardio — open the right one and just say what you need.
bullets: Natural language — no forms or dropdowns
Dedicated chats per day: nutrition, lifting, cardio

items.title: Nutrition Without the Headache
items.description: Meal plans that actually fit your life. Set your macros or let the AI figure it out based on your goals. Log meals fast with the food scanner.
bullets: Auto-generated meal plans based on your goals
Quick food logging with camera scanner

items.title: Training That Adapts
items.description: Structured programs for any level. Push/pull/legs, full body, cardio — your week is planned and adjustable.
bullets: Adjust your schedule with a message

items.question: Is Prime Coach free?
items.answer: You get 7 days free when you start so you can try the app. After the trial, a premium subscription unlocks the full experience, including unrestricted AI coaching and paid-only features. What's included at each step is shown in Google Play and in the app.

items.question: Do I need gym equipment?
items.answer: No. Prime Coach has programs for home and gym. During setup, you tell us what equipment you have access to, and your plan is built around that.

items.question: How is this different from MyFitnessPal or other apps?
items.answer: Most apps are either a food logger or a workout tracker. Prime Coach combines both and adds an AI coach you can actually talk to. Instead of manually searching menus, you just say what you want to change.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Yes. We don't sell your data to anyone. Your fitness and nutrition data is used only to personalize your experience. You can delete your account and all data at any time.

items.question: What languages does it support?
items.answer: Prime Coach supports English, Arabic, and Hebrew — both in the app and on this website.

items.question: Is it available on iOS?
items.answer: Prime Coach is currently available on Android via Google Play. iOS is coming soon — stay tuned!
